name: Sediment Chemical Composition Data from Belgian Collector Trial
description: Dataset containing sediment chemical measurements including aluminum, barium, iron, copper, manganese, nickel, phosphorus, strontium, titanium, lanthanum, lithium, magnesium, potassium, sodium, chromium, and calcium. Data includes relative errors, sediment depth, station information, geographic coordinates, elevation, and event details from a single sampling event in 2019.
